message.content:
STEP 1 COMPLETE — Rules locked.
Key constraints: Primary 2-3, Secondary 2-3, Tertiary max 4.
Options: max 10 per spec, under 25 chars.
Banned: Other, Custom, N/A, Unbranded, As Required.
Output: single JSON, no markdown fences.

STEP 2 COMPLETE — Wiki fully read.

Section 9 Demand Signals (ranked):
1. A5 Size → PRIMARY
2. Custom Logo Branding → TERTIARY (Customization)
3. PU Leather Cover → PRIMARY (Cover Material)
4. Magnetic or Strap Closure → SECONDARY (Closure Type)
5. Power Bank Integration → SECONDARY (Electronic Features)

Section 10 confirms buyers first ask: Size, Material, Price, and Customization.

Option values extracted from Section 3:
- Cover Material: Genuine Leather, Buff Leather, NDM Leather, PU Leather, PV Leather, Leatherette, Rexine, PU Foam, MDF Wooden Cover.
- Size: A4, A5, A6, B5, B7, 8×6", 7×5", 20×15 cm.
- Closure Type: Magnetic Flap, Leather Strap, Snap Button, Elastic Band, Metal Lock, Key Lock.
- Electronic Features: Power Bank, Charging Cables, USB Pen Drive, Wireless Charging.
- Paper Weight: 70 GSM, 80 GSM, 90 GSM, 100 GSM, 120 GSM.

Price drivers from Section 5: Cover Material, Integrated Electronics, Size.
Certifications/use cases from Section 6/7: BIS Certification (for electronics), Industry Applications (Corporate, Medical, Engineering).

Brand decision from Section 4: Include. Brands like Vision Diaries, Navneet, and Paperkraft are prominent differentiators in corporate tenders. Tier: Tertiary (mentioned in Section 10 as a secondary concern after material/price).

Dimension rule: YES. Section 9 and 10 rank "A5 Size" as the #1 demand signal.

STEP 3 COMPLETE.
Primary: Cover Material, Size | Secondary: Closure Type, Electronic Features | Tertiary: Brand, Paper Weight, Format, BIS Certification

Counts valid? Primary [2/3] Secondary [2/3] Tertiary [4/4]

STEP 4 — Audit...

TIERS
[PASS] Primary = Section 9 top demand signals (Size, Material)
[PASS] Secondary = price drivers (Electronics, Closure)
[PASS] Tertiary = certifications/features (Brand, GSM, Format, BIS)
[PASS] No spec in more than one tier
[PASS] Single-value specs in Tertiary only (BIS Certification)

SPEC NAMES
[PASS] All names from Section 9 or 10 — none invented
[PASS] Title Case, stopwords lowercase, no units in name
[PASS] No duplicates, all 1–3 words

BRAND
[PASS] Section 4 read, dominance checked, tier backed by wiki

DIMENSIONS (if applicable)
[PASS] Variable dimension only, rule determined by Section 9/10

OPTIONS
[PASS] Under 25 chars, no vague values, no duplicates
[PASS] Correct symbols (°C, m², m³, –), ordered by buyer frequency
[PASS] Max 10 per spec, reality-checked for Indian B2B

HALLUCINATION
[PASS] Every spec name and option traceable to wiki
[PASS] No values from general knowledge

Overall: [ALL PASS → output]

{
  "category_name": "Leather Diaries",
  "finalized_specs": {
    "finalized_primary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Size",
          "options": [
            "A5 (210×148 mm)",
            "B5 (245×180 mm)",
            "A4 (297×210 mm)",
            "A6 (148×105 mm)",
            "8×6\"",
            "7×5\"",
            "B7 (125×88 mm)",
            "20×15 cm"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Cover Material",
          "options": [
            "PU Leather",
            "Genuine Leather",
            "Buff Leather",
            "NDM Leather",
            "Leatherette",
            "Rexine",
            "PU Foam",
            "PV Leather",
            "MDF Wooden Cover"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_secondary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Electronic Features",
          "options": [
            "Power Bank",
            "Wireless Charging",
            "USB Pen Drive",
            "Charging Cables"
          ],
          "input_type": "multi_select"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Closure Type",
          "options": [
            "Magnetic Flap",
            "Leather Strap",
            "Snap Button",
            "Elastic Band",
            "Metal Lock",
            "Key Lock",
            "D Lock"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    },
    "finalized_tertiary_specs": {
      "specs": [
        {
          "spec_name": "Brand",
          "options": [
            "Vision Diaries",
            "Navneet",
            "Paperkraft",
            "Classmate",
            "Sundaram",
            "Madhav International",
            "M.S. Hilal International",
            "Hari Om Leather",
            "Sahaj Crafts",
            "Century Papers"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Paper Weight",
          "options": [
            "70 GSM",
            "80 GSM",
            "60 GSM",
            "90 GSM",
            "100 GSM",
            "120 GSM",
            "54 GSM"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "Format",
          "options": [
            "Dated Diary",
            "Undated Notebook",
            "Executive Organiser",
            "Planner",
            "Visitor Log",
            "Sketchbook"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        },
        {
          "spec_name": "BIS Certification",
          "options": [
            "Yes"
          ],
          "input_type": "radio_button"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
